name: text-linter
title: Text Linter
description: Clean pasted Markdown and prose with configurable lint rules.
author: roPio

commands.name: lint-text
commands.title: Lint Text
commands.description: Paste text, lint it, then copy, paste, or save the cleaned result.

commands.name: configure-rules
commands.title: Configure Rules
commands.description: Customize Text Linter rules and restore the bundled defaults.

preferences.name: prefillFromClipboard
preferences.title: Clipboard
preferences.description: Prefill the input field with the current clipboard text when Lint Text opens.
preferences.label: Prefill from clipboard

preferences.name: defaultSaveFileName
preferences.title: Save File Name
preferences.description: The default filename shown in the Save as File dialog.
